prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含原理科）最低位次依次约 9409→11356→9519→11071→11795，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 2300 名；2025 年基准约 11795 名；物理类本省计划 2021 年 42 人、2022 年 43 人、2023 年 46 人、2024 年 40 人、2025 年 43 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 60 人，较 2025 年扩招约 39.5%，招生名额显著增加，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升，2021 年第 81 名→2022 年第 80 名→2023 年第 77 名→2024 年第 76 名→2025 年第 74 名→2026 年第 72 名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力获认可；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 96（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中未见东华大学断档信号；材料科学与工程为第五轮学科评 估 A 级（全国前 10%），是学校核心优势学科；纺织科学与工程为"双一流"建设学科，服装设计与工程为"双一流"学科，在相关领域具有较强竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息类、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，东华大学相关专业招生吸引力较强；贵州省 2026 年高考总人数约 299000 人，较 2025 年（物理类 207171+历史类 90087=297258）基本持平略增，竞争环境总体稳定；东华大学位于上海市，属一线城市，对西南省份考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在贵州省招生占比约 1.5%（2025 年），属正常跨省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 11795 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 39.5% 导致竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力、上海地域优势及计算机/电子信息类专业高热等因素，但学校排名上升和上海地域吸引力部分抵消了扩招影响。预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 14543 名，区间 14043–15043 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 14043–15043 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业为冲刺目标、三档专业为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（如 14000 名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（15000 名左右）应以三档专业保底，同时争取二档中材料类、纺织类等优势学科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 9409 → 11356 → 9519 → 11071 → 11795, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2300 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 11795; the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 42 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 43 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 60, an expansion of about 39.5% compared to 2025, with a notable increase in enrollment slots, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been steadily rising, from 81st in 2021 → 80th in 2022 → 77th in 2023 → 76th in 2024 → 74th in 2025 → 72nd in 2026, with recent rankings steadily improving, gaining recognition for the university's comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (rated 'average'), with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no clear signal of increased application attention; no signal of a cutoff gap for Donghua University in historical submission anomaly records; Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline in the fifth round of discipline evaluation (top 10% nationally), a core advantageous discipline of the university; Textile Science and Engineering is a 'Double First-Class' construction discipline, and Fashion Design and Engineering is a 'Double First-Class' discipline, with strong competitiveness in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended with strong social popularity, enhancing the attractiveness of Donghua University's related majors; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 299,000, basically flat with a slight increase compared to 2025 (Physics Category 207,171 + History Category 90,087 = 297,258), with a generally stable competitive environment; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces; the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 1.5% (2025), a normal cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11795, the significant enrollment expansion of about 39.5% in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness, the regional advantage of Shanghai, and the high popularity of Computer/Electronic Information majors, but the rise in school rankings and Shanghai's regional appeal partially offset the impact of expansion. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 14543, with a range of 14043–15043.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Software Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Information Security)
- Electronic Information (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering)
- Mathematics (Intelligent Science Direction) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Materials (Polymer Materials and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, Composite Materials and Engineering)
- Textiles (Intelligent Textiles and Design) (Textile Engineering, Nonwoven Materials and Engineering)
- Functional Materials
- Management Science and Engineering (Information Management and Information Systems, E-commerce, Supply Chain Management)
- Bioengineering (Biomedical Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry (Light Chemical Engineering, Applied Chemistry)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Direction) (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science)
- Fashion Design and Engineering (Excellent Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14043–15043, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch goal, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 14000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 15000), you should use Tier 3 majors as a safety net while also striving for advantageous disciplines in Tier 2 such as Materials and Textiles.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升，2026 年第 72 名，学校综合实力稳步提升；2026 年声誉评价中性/混合；抖音热度一般；未见投档异常记录，学校整体声誉平稳；材料科学与工程 A 级，但历史类招生专业（经济管理试验班、经济与贸易类、新闻传播学类）与该校优势学科关联度较低。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2152 名、2026 年招生计划翻倍（6→13）导致竞争大幅加剧、历史类考生总数下降缓和竞争、新闻传播学类社会热度明显劝退等因素，但历史类考生减少和部分专业热度下降部分抵消了扩招影响。预测 2026 年历史类最低位次约 3628 名，区间 3128–4128 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2024–2025 minimum ranking for History Category approximately 2145→2152, basically flat over two years with minimal fluctuation; 2025 baseline approximately 2152; provincial plan for History Category: 6 in 2024, 6 in 2025; 2026 plan significantly increases to 13, an expansion of about 116.7% compared to 2025, doubling enrollment slots, leading to notably intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking continuously rising, 72nd in 2026, overall strength steadily improving; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity average; no abnormal filing records observed, overall reputation stable; Materials Science and Engineering rated A, but History Category enrollment majors (Economic Management Experimental Class, Economics and Trade, Journalism and Communication) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economic Management Experimental Class/Economics and Trade social popularity rated 'differentiated, wait-and-see', finance and economics majors popularity diverging; Journalism and Communication social popularity 'clearly discouraged', application willingness declining; Guizhou Province History Category examinees: 99,331 in 2024 → 90,087 in 2025, showing a downward trend, competition environment slightly eased; Donghua University located in Shanghai, has strong regional appeal for liberal arts examinees; the university's History Category enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is very small (only 6 in 2025), still limited after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2152, the doubling of enrollment plan in 2026 (6→13) leading to significantly intensified competition, the decline in total History Category examinees easing competition, and the clearly discouraged social popularity of Journalism and Communication, but the decrease in History Category examinees and declining popularity of some majors partially offset the expansion impact. Predicted 2026 minimum ranking for History Category approximately 3628, range 3128–4128.
